</script>

*/
.wp-block-prb-review {
  position: relative;
  margin: 20px 0;
}
.wp-block-prb-review p:empty {
  display: none !important;
}

  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: 0.2s !important;
}

  z-index: 1;
  position: absolute;
  top: -15px;
  left: 0;

  font-size: 14px;

}

}

}

}

}

}

  position: absolute;
  top: 50%;

  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;

  text-align: center;

}

  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__product_box {
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: center;
}

}

}

  width: 62%;
}

  display: inline-block;
  color: #24b644;
  background-color: #d7f9df;
  border: 1px dashed #24b644;
  font-size: 15px;
  padding: 5px 5px;
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer !important;
  position: relative;
}

  opacity: 1;
  visibility: visible;
  transform: translateY(0);
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__comparison_coupon_code,
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__action_btn {
  margin: 5px 2px;
}

  margin-right: 3px;
  font-size: 14px;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item input#prb__coupon_code_id {
  background: none;
  border: none;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  width: 88%;
  cursor: pointer;
  color: #24b644;
  font-size: 14px;
  text-align: center;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__comparison_tooltip {
  position: absolute;
  top: -33px;
  left: 50%;
  width: -moz-max-content;
  width: max-content;
  background: #000;
  padding: 3px 5px;
  font-size: 14px;
  margin-left: -27px;
  border-radius: 3px;
  color: #fff;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  opacity: 0;
  visibility: visible;
  transform: translateY(-5px);
  transition: 0.2s;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .review-rating {
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__featured_icon {
  position: absolute;
  top: -15px;
  right: -15px;
  width: 30px;
  height: 30px;
  text-align: center;
  line-height: 30px;
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1px solid currentColor;
  color: #77b4f7;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__best_items_wrapper {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 15px 0 5px;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__best_item img {
  max-width: 20px;
  display: block;
  margin: 0 auto;
  height: 100%;
  -o-object-fit: contain;
     object-fit: contain;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__best_item {
  margin: 0 2px;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item span.prb__best_item_label {
  display: block;
  font-size: 12px;
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 10px;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__icon {
  height: 40px;
  width: 100%;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item span.prb__best_for_label {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 4px 16px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  background-color: #33b7f9;
  color: #fff;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__best_for {
  text-align: center;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__comparison_coupon_code_text {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 15px;
  margin-bottom: 2px;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__icon img {
  width: 25px;
  height: 100%;
  -o-object-fit: contain;
     object-fit: contain;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .wp-block-prb-icon {
  margin: 0 5px !important;
  width: 100%;
}
.wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__label {
  font-size: 12px;
  line-height: 1.4;
  margin-top: 5px;
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 767px) {
  .wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__product_box {
    flex-direction: column;
  }
  .wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__product_box .prb__product_photo,
  .wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__product_box .prb__product_box_info,
  .wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__product_box .prb__product_box_action {
    width: 100%;
  }
  .wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__product_box .prb__product_photo {
    text-align: center;
  }
  .wp-block-prb-product-item .prb__product_box .prb__product_photo img {
    max-width: 70%;
  }
}

</style>

		flex-direction: column-reverse;
	}
	.category-form .elementor-field.elementor-select-wrapper select#form-field-name,
	.category-form input#form-field-email{
		    border-radius: 20px !important;
			border-left-color:transparent !important; 
	}

	{
		content:unset;
	}
	
	
}</style>

/* blockquote old design */

blockquote.wp-block-quote {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    overflow-wrap: break-word;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    padding: 60px 20px 20px;
    position: relative;
    border-radius: 10px 10px 10px 0;
    text-align: center;
    margin: 12px 0 20px;
    box-shadow: 8px 7px 0px #c3eaff;
}

blockquote.wp-block-quote::after {
    content: "";
    position: absolute;
    top: 15px;
    left: 50%;
    background: url("/wp-content/uploads/2022/07/quote.png") no-repeat center;
    width: 30px;
    height: 30px;
    background-size: contain;
    transform: translateX(-50%) rotate(180deg);
}

blockquote.wp-block-quote p {
    font-weight: 600;
    font-style: italic;
}

blockquote.wp-block-quote p:last-of-type {
    margin-bottom: 0px;
}

    width: 1165px;

  max-height: 100vh;
}	
	
}</style>

<script>
// hide product popup
jQuery(document).ready(function(){  
  jQuery('.onoffreview[data-id="97a370c"]').prepend('<span class="close-product-popup">×</span>');

  jQuery(".close-product-popup").click(function(){
    jQuery(this).parents(".onoffreview").fadeOut();
  });
  
})
jQuery(window).scroll(function (event) {
    var scroll = jQuery(window).scrollTop();
  var scrollBottom =  jQuery(document).height() * 0.6;

  
    if(scroll >= scrollBottom){
     jQuery('.onoffreview').show();
  }
});

jQuery(document).ready(function(){
  jQuery(".header-menu-toggle .elementor-button").click(function(){
    setTimeout(function(){ 
      if (jQuery(window).width() <= 767) {
        //remove default events
        jQuery(".header-tabs .elementor-tab-title").off();
        jQuery(".header-tabs .elementor-tab-content").off();

        //hide open tabs
        // jQuery(".header-tabs .elementor-tab-title").removeClass("elementor-active");
        // jQuery(".header-tabs .elementor-tab-content").removeClass("elementor-active");
        // jQuery(".header-tabs .elementor-tab-content").hide();

        jQuery(".header-tabs .elementor-tab-title").click(function(){
          var tab_id = jQuery(this).attr("data-tab");

          jQuery(this).toggleClass("elementor-active");

          var tab_content = jQuery(".header-tabs").find(".elementor-tab-content[data-tab='"+tab_id+"']");

          tab_content.toggleClass("elementor-active");
          tab_content.toggle();
          console.log(tab_id);
        })
      } 
    }, 500);
  });   
});
jQuery(document).ready(function($){
   jQuery(".elementor-post__thumbnail__link").removeAttr("href");
   jQuery(".elementor-author-box__avatar").removeAttr("href");
  jQuery(".dadauth a").removeAttr("href");
  
  
  var all_links = document.querySelectorAll('a');
  for (var i = 0; i < all_links.length; i++){
      var a = all_links[i];
      //console.log(a.hostname);
      if(a.hostname != location.hostname) {
        // if(typeof a.rel != "undefined"){
        //   a.rel = a.rel + ' noopener';
        // }
        // else{
        //  a.rel = 'noopener'; 
        // }   
        a.target = '_blank';
      }
  }
  
  // scroll to comment
  setTimeout(function(){
    $("#wpd-bubble-wrapper").off();
  }, 500);
  $("#wpd-bubble-wrapper").prepend(`<a href="#commentsection" class="scroll-to-comment"></a>`);
  
  
  //add nofollow
  const nofollow_domains = new Array(
  
    "wb22trk.com",
    "crazybulk.ca",
    "purerawz.co",
    "chemyo.com",
    "sportstechnologylabs.com",
    "aminoasylum.shop",
    "biotechpeptides.com",
    "testoprime.com",
    "sjv.io",
    "personanutrition.com",
    "amazon.com",
    "amzn.to",
    "shareasale.com",
    "evolvetelemed.com",
    "modafinilxl.com",
    "mixi.mn",
    "crazybulk.com",
    "swisschems.is",
    "1md.org",
    "uksarms.com",
    "behemothlabz.com",
    "essentialelementsnutrition.com"

    );

    $("a").each(function(index, item){

    var hostname = $(item).prop('hostname');

    hostname = hostname.replace('www.', '');

    //console.log(hostname);

    if($.inArray(hostname, nofollow_domains) !== -1){

      $(item).attr("rel", "nofollow");

    }

    });
  
  
});



//post content scrollspy effect
// jQuery(document).ready(function($){

//   var sectionIds = $('.single-post a.ez-toc-link');

//     $(document).scroll(function(){
//         sectionIds.each(function(){

//             var container = $(this).attr('href');
// 			var nextContainer = $(this).parent().next().find("a.ez-toc-link").attr('href');
			
//             var containerOffset = $(container).offset().top;
// 			var nextContainerOffset = $(nextContainer).offset().top;
			
//             var scrollPosition = $(document).scrollTop();
    
//             if(scrollPosition >= containerOffset - 100 && scrollPosition <= nextContainerOffset - 50){
//                 $(this).addClass('active');
//             } else{
//                 $(this).removeClass('active');
//             }
    
    
//         });
//     });
	
// });


	
var sections = jQuery('.full-section'), nav = jQuery('.jump-left'), nav_height = nav.outerHeight();

jQuery(window).on('scroll', function() {
	
	var cur_pos = jQuery(this).scrollTop();
	
	sections.each(function() {
		
		var top = jQuery(this).offset().top - 300;
		
		var bottom = top + jQuery(this).outerHeight();
		
		if (cur_pos >= top && cur_pos <= bottom) {
			
			nav.find('a').removeClass('active');
			
			sections.removeClass('active');
			
			jQuery(this).addClass('active');
			
			nav.find('a[href="#' + jQuery(this).attr('id') + '"]').addClass('active');
			
		}

	});

});
	
	
/************Search Input ***********/
	
		
	
// 	jQuery('.elementor-search-form__submit').click(function(){
//    if(jQuery.trim(jQuery('.elementor-search-form-cccfece').val()) == ''){
//       alert('Enter Keywords....');
//    }return false;
//});

function isValidURL(string) {
  var res = string.match(/(http(s)?:\/\/.)?(www\.)?[-a-zA-Z0-9@:%._\+~#=]{2,256}\.[a-z]{2,6}\b([-a-zA-Z0-9@:%_\+.~#?&//=]*)/g);
  return (res !== null)
};

jQuery(document).on("click", "a", function(evt) {
	
	//evt.preventDefault();
	
    //this == the link that was clicked
    var anchor =jQuery(this).attr("href");
	if(anchor == undefined){
		var href =jQuery(this).attr("data-href");
	}
	else {
		var href = anchor;
	}
	
	if(isValidURL(href)){
		
		var url = new URL(href);
	
		var url_host = url.host;

		var base_url = window.location.host;
		
		//console.log(url_host);

		if (url_host != base_url){

			//console.log(`Click to ${url_host}`);

			fathom.trackEvent(`Click to ${url_host}`);

		}
		
	}
	
});
</script>

}

		<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@4.6.2/dist/js/bootstrap.min.js" integrity="sha384-+sLIOodYLS7CIrQpBjl+C7nPvqq+FbNUBDunl/OZv93DB7Ln/533i8e/mZXLi/P+" crossorigin="anonymous"></script>

		<script>
			
			jQuery(document).ready(function($){

				$("body").append(`

					<div class="modal fade product-discount-popup" id="product-discount-popup" tabindex="-1" aria-labelledby="exampleModalLabel" aria-hidden="true">
					  <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered">
					    <div class="modal-content">
					      <div class="modal-header">
					        <button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close">
					          <span aria-hidden="true">&times;</span>
					        </button>
					      </div>
					      <div class="modal-body">
					      	<div class="text-center py-5">
						      	<div class="spinner-border" role="status">
										  <span class="sr-only">Loading...</span>
										</div>
									</div>
					      </div>
					    </div>
					  </div>
					</div>

				`);


				// add nofollow to popup toggle btn
				$(".product-discount-popup-toggle, .product-discount-popup-toggle-outer .prb__action_btn, .product-discount-popup-toggle-outer .post-sidebar-cta .cta-btn, .product-discount-popup-toggle-outer .affx-product-buy-btn").each(function(){
					
					$(this).attr("rel", "nofollow");

					$(this).attr("data-href", $(this).attr("href"));

					$(this).removeAttr("href");
				
				});


				$("body").on("click", ".product-discount-popup-toggle, .product-discount-popup-toggle-outer .prb__action_btn, .product-discount-popup-toggle-outer .post-sidebar-cta .cta-btn, .product-discount-popup-toggle-outer .affx-product-buy-btn", function(evt){

					evt.preventDefault();

					var $product_slug = $(this).data("href");

					$.ajax({

           	type : "POST",

         	  dataType : "json",

           	url : "https://muscleandbrawn.com/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php",

           	data : {
           		
           		action: "get_product_discount",

           		product_slug: $product_slug,

           		post_id: "",

           		permalink: "", 

           	},

           	success: function(response) {

              //console.log(response);

              $("#product-discount-popup").find(".modal-body").html(response.data);

            },

            beforeSend: function () {

              $("#product-discount-popup").modal("show");

	          }

					});

				});


				$("#product-discount-popup").on("show.bs.modal", function (event) {

				  $("html").addClass("modal-open");

				});

				$("#product-discount-popup").on("hide.bs.modal", function (event) {

				  $("html").removeClass("modal-open");

				});


			});

		</script>

body.post-template-default #ez-toc-container {background: #fff;border: 0;box-shadow: 0 0 7px 0px #ccc;padding: 20px;}

body.post-template-default #ez-toc-container p.ez-toc-title { font-size: 20px;
    color: #000;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    display: inline-block;}
		body.post-template-default #ez-toc-container  .ez-toc-title-toggle{display:inline-block}
		body.post-template-default #ez-toc-container  .ez-toc-title-container p{margin:0px;}
		body.post-template-default #ez-toc-container  .ez-toc-title-toggle a{	margin: 0!important;
			padding: 0;    position: absolute;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%; justify-content: flex-end;
    left: 0;
    top: 0;}
		body.post-template-default #ez-toc-container .ez-toc-title-container{position:relative; margin-bottom:15px;}
		body.post-template-default #ez-toc-container  .ez-toc-title-toggle a label {border:none;}
		body.post-template-default #ez-toc-container  .ez-toc-title-toggle a label span svg{display:none}

    font-weight: 900;
    content: "\f107";
}

@media(max-width:639px){
.elementor-42156 .elementor-element.elementor-element-17f8aafe {order: -1;display: block;overflow: hidden;}

				<ul id="menu-2-aea3f17" class="elementor-nav-menu sm-vertical"><li class="menu-item menu-item-type-post_type menu-item-object-post menu-item-286476"><a href="https://muscleandbrawn.com/peptides/best-peptide-vendors/" class="elementor-item" tabindex="-1">Buy Peptides</a></li>

						</div>

<script type="text/javascript">
jQuery(window).scroll(function(){
    if (jQuery(this).scrollTop() > 50) {
      jQuery('#fixedheader').addClass('sticky');
    } else {
      jQuery('#fixedheader').removeClass('sticky');
    }
});
</script>
<script>
jQuery(document).ready(function(){
 jQuery(".elementor-tab-mobile-title").click(function(){
  jQuery(".elementor-tab-content").toggleClass("activetabs");
  });
});
	
	

	
		var sections = jQuery('.full-section'),
    nav = jQuery('.jump-left'),
    nav_height = nav.outerHeight();
jQuery(window).on('scroll', function() {
    var cur_pos = jQuery(this).scrollTop();
    sections.each(function() {
        var top = jQuery(this).offset().top - 300;
        var bottom = top + jQuery(this).outerHeight();
        if (cur_pos >= top && cur_pos <= bottom) {
            nav.find('a').removeClass('active');
            sections.removeClass('active');
            jQuery(this).addClass('active');
            nav.find('a[href="#' + jQuery(this).attr('id') + '"]').addClass('active');
        }
    });
});
	

</script>
